subject: Build homepage and brands page templates
description: Phase 3.1+3.4: Build homepage (src/pages/index.astro) with hero section ("Find, compare & decide."), animated search bar, category shortcuts (Phones, Laptops, TVs, Cars, Watches), popular products grid, latest releases carousel, brand showcase by category, latest news section, WebSite+SearchAction JSON-LD. Build brands page (src/pages/brands.astro) with category sections (Premium, Gaming, Mid-Range, Value, Budget, Auto, Other), brand tiles with logos and category-aware product counts, alphabetical index.
